personal.name: Muhammad Afaq Umar
personal.title: Senior Backend Engineer
personal.summary: Senior Backend Engineer with 6+ years of experience, specializing in payment-driven systems, scalable backend solutions, and API architecture.
personal.aboutExtended: I've worked with international clients to build high-scale platforms handling millions in transactions and thousands of active users, including platforms like Veva Collect and Prescription Hope. I thrive in solving complex backend problems and building systems that drive business impact.
personal.aboutClosing: When I'm not coding, I enjoy solving real-world challenges that push me to learn and apply the latest technologies.
personal.techLove: PHP, Laravel, Go, MySQL, AWS, Stripe, GraphQL, and building scalable, high-performance systems

projects.name: Prescription Hope
projects.description: Healthcare medication assistance platform serving 90K+ patients.
highlights: Owned backend across employee and patient portals supporting $10M+ in monthly payments.
Integrated Stripe, USAePay, and Payroc for recurring billing.
Designed scalable database architecture with indexing and optimized queries.
Built 20+ cron jobs for billing, renewals, and automation.

projects.name: Veva Collect
projects.description: High-scale music collaboration platform used by major labels and Grammy-winning producers.
highlights: Led backend development handling ~5,000 file uploads per day with files up to 10GB.
Designed distributed file-processing pipeline using AWS S3, SQS, Lambda, Redis, and Go microservices.
Built async ZIP creation system to support 25GB+ multi-file shares without UX degradation.
Introduced load balancing to prevent outages during heavy concurrent collaboration.

projects.name: Step2Compliance
highlights: Built AWS Lambda + SQS workflows triggering Laravel webhooks.
Developed Python automation for XLSM generation and syncing.

projects.name: RadioBridge
highlights: Developed analytics dashboards for IoT LoRaWAN data.
Worked on backend integrations and data pipelines.
Integrated Stripe payments and appointment scheduling systems.
Built ERP modules and Twilio SMS/video features.
Built ERP modules and led a small development team.
